name: orphan_attachment
description: A `.field` attachment with no matching `^` marker cell in its row MUST be rejected (SPEC 16.5). Here `.extra` names no column of the {id,name} schema and no cell carries `^`, so it is an orphan. Previously the decoder silently injected it as an undeclared extra field on the row, decoding to a record no encoder would ever produce (a lossless-round-trip hole). The one legitimate bare attachment (a `>`-named field per SPEC 7.4.6.1.4) is covered by flatten/016_gt_in_field_name.json.
